#### [Coral](https://github.com/achabense/coral)

This is a toy for exploring isotropic 3-state CA rules in the range-1 Moore neighborhood.

#### Example
(Open this file as raw text for the corresponding rule string.)

<img width="252" height="191" alt="" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2a1c4efb-c2ee-479b-bb36-3e5f0bc03dc4" />


#### Dependencies
- CMake
- C++20
- [ImGui](https://github.com/ocornut/imgui) and [SDL](https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL) (both will be fetched by CMake)
